case_title: YONG CHANG WU et al VS. SETON PROVINCIAL HOUSE et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WU, YONG CHANG XU, AILING AS TO DEFENDANT SETON PROVINCIAL HOUSE NGUYEN, LUCIA LAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. PATRICK LI INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFFS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, YONG CHANG XU, AILING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SETON PROVINCIAL HOUSE NGUYEN, LUCIA LAM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
